concept: I'd love a game where I control a character who exists simultaneously in parallel dimensions, shown as overlapping transparent worlds on screen. Actions in one dimension affect the other, so solving puzzles requires understanding how objects and environments interact across realities. Certain creatures can perceive both dimensions, becoming either allies or formidable enemies that track me across worlds. The story explores how these dimensions began diverging from a single timeline and my character's unique role in potentially reuniting them.
